description: Scanner-EPG-Momentum strategy parameters — derived from hawkes-ofi-impact Phase S/T/U

epg.description: Phase R: k=5, tau=300s, p=0.65. First fail median 1001s.

hawkes.description: Phase A iter 7: K=1 univariate, beta_fixed=0.1, rho=0.99. Online refit every 50 trades.

exit_d.description: Phase U T10 best combo: theta=0.65 tau=4s PF=1.3848. Default Phase U: theta=0.75 tau=8s.

luld.description: Tier 2 LULD band proximity exit at 2% threshold. RTH only (09:30-16:00 ET).

gap_gate.description: Requires intraday_pct >= 30% at entry. Backtest only — live feed handles this differently.

epg_window_close_exit.description: EXIT when EPG PASS window closes (gate transitions PASS -> FAIL/INACTIVE). Phase S: 100% of exits via this mechanism.
